sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74026" key="o)nei/raut" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀνείρ-αυτ-</orth> (or <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀνειρ-αυθ-)οπτικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n74026.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bringing a vision of a god</tr_> (cf. foreg.) (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πρᾶξις</foreign>), ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3173</biblScope> </bibl> (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὀνειροθαυπτανη</foreign> Pap.).</sense> </entryFree>
